overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a cluttered neon-lit apartment, descending in an industrial elevator, and emerging into a foggy cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features heavy red and cyan neon signage, moderate pedestrian traffic, and a persistent hazy atmosphere throughout the outdoor portion.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered apartment office with neon lighting

events.description: red metal security gate opens to reveal the interior room
character slows and stops at the elevator call button

agents.ego_description: walking through the red security gate into a cluttered neon-lit room and approaching the elevator

entered.detail: red painted metal gate with horizontal bars that opens to allow entry
desk covered with computer equipment and papers against the right wall
bright cyan neon light strips illuminating the back of the room
pink neon sign with monkey logo and text near the elevator
collapsible metal security gate for the elevator shaft

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a red metal security gate into a cluttered apartment space illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights. The room contains scattered boxes, computer equipment, and debris on the floor, with a 'Spunky Monkey' neon sign visible near the elevator at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial freight elevator with metal grating walls

events.description: character enters the elevator from the apartment
elevator begins descending from floor 13 to ground floor
elevator doors open revealing the foggy street outside

agents.ego_description: entering the elevator, pressing the button, and waiting during the descent to ground floor

entered.detail: dark metal walls with diagonal support beams and grating
digital panel displaying floor numbers and direction arrows
black garbage bags piled in the corner of the elevator

segments.scene_description: The character enters an industrial freight elevator with metal grating walls and a dim yellow interior. The elevator descends from floor 13 to the ground floor, with the control panel displaying the floor changes, before the metal grating doors open to reveal the street outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit cyberpunk city sidewalk with mixed traffic

events.description: character exits the building onto the neon-lit street
white car drives past on the street as character approaches the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator into the foggy street and walking along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow outfit walking along the sidewalk
white sedan driving down the foggy street

entered.detail: frosted glass double doors leading from the elevator to the street
large red neon sign with '24' and Japanese characters spanning the street
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
teal-colored vending machine with glowing advertisements
trees in concrete planters along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting into a foggy cyberpunk city street at night, the scene is dominated by red and cyan neon signage including a prominent '24' sign. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk past pedestrians and parked cars, with the street lined by mixed-era buildings, vending machines, and glowing advertisements in the hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic interior of a neon-lit apartment into the expansive, hazy atmosphere of a cyberpunk city street. It begins by passing through a red metal security gate into a cluttered room filled with debris and computer equipment, illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights. As the camera moves toward the far end of the space, it enters a dim yellow industrial freight elevator, descending through the floors until the metal grating doors slide open. The scene then shifts from the enclosed lift to the open night air, emerging onto a concrete sidewalk dominated by red and cyan signage and a prominent 24 sign. Finally, the camera glides past pedestrians and parked cars, moving deeper into the foggy street lined with glowing advertisements and mixed-era buildings.
